creator: marrob@people.it
text:
error in building kernel

I found acpi.wakeup release 1.39.2.2 2006/08/12 in usr/src/sys/i386/apica
Hw:
Mobo Tyan S2095 - P4 2 ghz
Gcc flags:
arch: 1386
flags CPUtYPE: pentium4

usr/src/sys/modules/acpi/acpi/../../../i386/acpica/acpi_wakeup.c: In function `acpi_sleep_machdep':
/usr/src/sys/modules/acpi/acpi/../../../i386/acpica/acpi_wakeup.c:285: error: `acpi_resume_beep' undeclared (first use in this function)
/usr/src/sys/modules/acpi/acpi/../../../i386/acpica/acpi_wakeup.c:285: error: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
/usr/src/sys/modules/acpi/acpi/../../../i386/acpica/acpi_wakeup.c:285: error: for each function it appears in.)
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src/sys/modules/acpi/acpi.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src/sys/modules/acpi.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src/sys/modules.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/obj/usr/src/sys/NIRVANA.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src.
*** Error code 1
Stop in /usr/src.

How-To-Repeat: make buildkernel
